suite: EPIC 2E-J — Step 7B-B-F2-S/F2-S2/F2-S3: static coverage self-test (source audit only, no Chromium)

results.test: qa/epic-2e-j-phase-c-step7b-b-test.mjs is readable
ui/interactive-preview-observation-renderer-v2.js is readable (for touch-target cross-check)
qa/epic-2e-j-phase-c-step7b-b-f1-static-results.json is readable
Every required Contrast category string appears in the Browser test source
Missing-Element path (Contrast) calls FAIL, not NOT_TESTED
Missing-Element path (Touch target) calls FAIL, not NOT_TESTED
Missing-Element path (Focus indicator) calls FAIL, not NOT_TESTED
Ordinary foreground-color parse failure calls FAIL (Contrast)
Ordinary outline/box-shadow indicator-color parse failure calls FAIL (Focus indicator)
The only permitted Contrast NOT_TESTED path is the documented gradient/background-image limitation
results.evidence: hasDocumentedGradientNotTested=true, total 'NOT_TESTED' string literal occurrences in source=8

results.test: Normal-text WCAG threshold 4.5:1 exists in the Contrast audit
Large-text threshold 3.0 exists and is proven by computed fontSize/fontWeight (never tag name)
Focus indicator contrast threshold 3:1 exists
Touch-target threshold is 43.5 (old 40px tolerance removed)
All 17 touch targets are enumerated (4 Observation radios + 10 Reasons + 3 Clear buttons, cross-checked against real renderer option-array lengths)
results.evidence: obsOptionCount=4, reasonOptionCount=10, clearButtonCheckCount=3, total=17, hasRadiosForEach=true, hasReasonsForEach=true

results.test: Touch-target pass requires BOTH width>=43.5 AND height>=43.5 (not height-only)
Every touch target is recorded as {id, width, height, pass}
Physical touch hardware remains NOT_TESTED (unchanged, still the only permitted manual gap)
Browser result is live-detected as BROWSER_BINARY_AVAILABLE/UNAVAILABLE (retired NOT_RUN_ENVIRONMENT_BLOCKED literal no longer emitted; consistent with F1 static-results honest-status record)
FIX 1: background-image is checked unconditionally on every visited element, before any opaque-color break (old gated pattern removed)
results.evidence: oldGatedPatternGone=true, unconditionalCheckOccurrences=3 (expected 3: Warning capture, main Contrast sweep, Focus indicator)

results.test: FIX 1: a contributing background-image is never silently cleared once an opaque ancestor is later found
FIX 2: foreground color is parsed as RGBA (4-tuple with alpha), not just opaque RGB

FIX 2 (F2-S3): computed opacity is inspected via a bounded ancestor walk, and ancestor opacity is NEVER multiplied into the foreground alpha (old fgRgba[3]*opacityValue composite removed; composition uses the foreground's own alpha only)
FIX 2 (F2-S3): any target/ancestor opacity below 1 is honestly NOT_TESTED ("CSS group opacity requires full foreground/background group compositing"), never used to fabricate a Ratio
FIX 2: an unresolvable opacity chain is honestly NOT_TESTED with bounded evidence, never silently assumed to be 1
FIX 3: Reason-limit / Selected Reasons / Session metrics / Top Reasons all require non-empty text before contrast is calculated
FIX 3: Warning text is produced by a genuine Re-analyze workflow (never DOM-mutated), measured in its real transient window, honestly FAILed if never produced
FIX 4 (superseded by F2-S3 FIX 1): the old cross-control comparison (disabled color-balance vs. a DIFFERENT enabled Reason) is gone
FIX 5 (superseded by F2-S3 FIX 4/5/6): the old single-capture (no unfocused/focused comparison) Focus indicator approach is gone
FIX 6: a single shared recordContrastEntry() applies identical decision rules to the main Contrast sweep and the standalone Warning check
FIX 1: the SAME color-balance control is captured before (four Reasons selected, enabled) and after (fifth Reason selected, disabled) via one shared snap function
FIX 1: color-balance is verified unchecked (checked === false) in both the enabled and disabled snapshots
FIX 1: cursor, className, and the disabled property itself are captured for evidence only and never counted as visual distinction on their own
FIX 1: no CSS/class is added to color-balance merely to force a pass; the NOT_TESTED fallback is honest
FIX 3: every Contrast target (main sweep + Warning) checks display/visibility/non-zero rect/client-rects before measurement; hidden/zero-size targets FAIL, never NOT_TESTED
FIX 3: recordContrastEntry() fails closed on a notVisible target before any color/ratio calculation is attempted
FIX 4: Focus style is captured before (genuine unfocused baseline) and after (real keyboard focus) using the same captureFocusStyle function for both
FIX 4: focused style must genuinely differ from unfocused style; a decorative indicator unchanged in both states is explicitly rejected
FIX 5: Focus indicator color is parsed as RGBA and its alpha is genuinely composited over the resolved adjacent background when below 1 (never discarded)
FIX 6: multiple/ambiguous box-shadow layers fail closed to NOT_TESTED, never assuming the first RGB value or falling back to outlineColor
FIX 6: a decorative box-shadow present unchanged in both unfocused and focused captures cannot satisfy usingBoxShadow (cannot pass as a Focus indicator)

disclaimer: This suite audits the SOURCE TEXT of qa/epic-2e-j-phase-c-step7b-b-test.mjs for the presence of required categories/thresholds/wiring. It does NOT execute a browser, does NOT measure real computed colors or element sizes, and does NOT prove real Contrast/Touch-target PASS. A PASS here means "the required code path is present," not "the real UI meets WCAG."

browserSuiteExecution.note: COMBINED CLOSEOUT R1 Phase F: live-detected every run, replacing the retired NOT_RUN_ENVIRONMENT_BLOCKED literal. This F2-S/S2/S3 patch did not execute, simulate, or regenerate the real browser suite or its result JSON — Browser availability is reported here for diagnostic purposes only.
